ddls:
CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode of the server (e.g., PvP, PvE, RP) */,
  "map" TEXT /* Map used by the server */,
  "mods" TEXT /* Mods installed on the server */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed on the server */,
  "current_players" INTEGER /* Current number of players online */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the server (e.g., Online, Offline) */,
  "registered_since" TEXT /* Date the server was registered */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "port" INTEGER /* Port number on which the server is running */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region where the server is located */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster the server belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "replica_id" INTEGER /* ID of the replica server (if applicable) */,
  "last_update_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the server settings or performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "registered_since" TEXT /* Date the player registered */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the player's last activity */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used by the player (e.g., PC, Console) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server administrator */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server they administer */,
  "registered_since" TEXT /* Date the administrator registered */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., Admin, Moderator) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the administrator's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_admins_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., game mode, map) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the setting */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who last updated the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_settings_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server the metric belongs to */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of the server */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the server */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency of the server */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the performance metric */,
  "network_bandwidth" REAL /* Network bandwidth usage of the server */,
  "uptime" INTEGER /* Uptime of the server in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_performance_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity event */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server the activity occurred on */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the activity */,
  "join_time" TEXT /* Time the player joined the server */,
  "leave_time" TEXT /* Time the player left the server */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the player's session in minutes */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., Join, Leave, In-Game) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_activity_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_activity_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server the update occurred on */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time the update occurred */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., setting change, performance metric) */,
  "update_value" TEXT /* Value of the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who performed the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_updates_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES server_admins ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_servers" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the server */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the player last logged into the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_clusters" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id", "cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region where the cluster is located */,
  "created_since" TEXT /* Date the cluster was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replicas" (
  "replica_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each replica */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main server the replica belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the replica (e.g., Active, Standby) */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last synchronization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("replica_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replicas_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_roles" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_since" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id", "role_id")
)
